$comment: Ownership contract enforced by tools/check-branch.mjs. master-owned paths are pushed with updates and MUST NOT be edited in a branch. branch-owned paths are the client's and are NEVER overwritten by an update.
masterOwnedNote: Everything not branchOwned and not ignored is master-owned and protected by the lockfile.

forbiddenInMaster.$comment: Patterns that indicate client-specific data leaking into master files. The validator flags these in master-owned files (excluding the allowed list).
forbiddenInMaster.$denyClientNamesNote: Add a client's brand name / handle here on a branch-template to catch it being committed into master by mistake.
